summary: Completed frontend testing of navigation and visualization features for RX Expresss pharmacy delivery app. All new features are working correctly: Driver portal shows deliveries sorted by stop order with navigation icons, Admin Routes page has Map View toggle and clickable gig cards with details modal, Admin Orders page has Map View toggle with color-coded status markers on Leaflet map.

driver_portal: Deliveries sorted by stop_sequence (stop 1, stop 2, etc.) - 8 delivery cards displayed in sequence
Stop number badges shown in teal gradient circles (1, 2, 3...)
Navigate icon (blue arrow) next to each delivery card - 8 navigate icons found
Navigate Full Route button at top - shows 'Navigate Full Route (8 stops)'
data-testid attributes present: navigate-full-route-btn, delivery-card-{id}, navigate-stop-{id}
admin_routes_page: Map View toggle button present with data-testid='routes-map-view-toggle'
Map View shows 'All orders have been assigned to routes' message when no pending orders
15 Active Gigs displayed with numbered badges, dates, order counts
Clickable gig cards open Gig Details Modal
Gig Details Modal shows: stops count, status, driver assignment, distributed status
Modal has 'No stops in this gig yet' message when linked_orders is empty (expected per requirements)
Navigate Full Route button and Route Map section coded in modal (visible when stops exist)
admin_orders_page: Map View toggle button present with data-testid='orders-map-view-toggle'
Map View shows Leaflet map with order locations (4 mapped)
Color-coded status legend visible (New=amber, Picked Up=blue, In Transit=purple, Out for Delivery=teal, Delivered=green)
Status category cards show order counts (1 New, 1 Picked Up, 1 In Transit, 17 Out for Delivery)

critical_code_review_comments: Driver portal sorting uses stop_sequence ?? circuit_stop_sequence ?? index + 1 - correctly implemented
DeliveryMap component uses Leaflet with proper CDN icons and custom numbered markers
buildGoogleMapsRouteUrl helper correctly builds multi-stop navigation URLs
Gig details modal linked_orders may be empty if orders not properly synced with Circuit API - this is data-dependent, not a code issue
seed_data_creation: Used existing test data - 8 deliveries for driver, 15 gigs for routes
context_for_next_testing_agent: Navigation and visualization features are fully implemented. Leaflet maps work for both Orders (all orders with color-coded status) and Routes (pending orders for routing). Gig details modal shows sorted stops when linked_orders data exists - empty modal is expected when orders are not properly linked via Circuit API. Driver portal shows deliveries sorted by stop_sequence with navigation icons.

driver_portal_deliveries_sorted.details: 8 deliveries displayed in stop sequence order (1-8) with numbered badges

driver_portal_navigate_icon.details: Blue navigation arrow icon present on each delivery card (8 icons)

driver_portal_navigate_full_route.details: Button shows 'Navigate Full Route (8 stops)' at top of deliveries list

admin_routes_map_view.details: Toggle button present, map shows pending orders or 'all assigned' message

admin_routes_gig_details_modal.details: Clickable gig cards open modal with stops, status, driver info, and navigate button (when stops exist)

admin_orders_map_view.details: Toggle shows Leaflet map with 4 mapped orders, color-coded by status

admin_orders_status_legend.details: Legend shows New, Picked Up, In Transit, Out for Delivery, Delivered with colored markers
